sections.instructions: Provide a concise, non-technical summary of the proposed research, suitable for a general audience. This should clearly explain the problem being addressed, the approach, and the potential impact of the research.

sections.instructions: Provide a technical summary of the proposed research, including the scientific aims, methodology, and expected outcomes. This abstract should be suitable for researchers in the field and other experts. Keywords should also be included.

sections.title: Technical Abstract

sections.instructions: Provide a detailed background of the research topic, including the current state of knowledge, gaps in research, and the rationale for the proposed project. Clearly state the specific aims of the research, explaining the hypothesis being tested and the specific questions to be addressed. Clearly articulate the translational science gap this work will address.
sections.name: background_and_specific_aims
sections.title: Background and Specific Aims

sections.instructions: Describe the potential impact of the proposed research on the prevention, detection, diagnosis, or treatment of melanoma. Articulate how the project will translate scientific findings into practical applications for high-risk individuals and patients with melanoma, addressing the gap in translational science. Specifically state what new tools and treatments you expect to develop as a result of this project.
sections.name: impact_and_translation
sections.title: Impact and Translation

translational research for novel melanoma treatments
development of diagnostic tools for melanoma detection

advances in melanoma diagnosis and treatment
bridging the gap in translational melanoma science

sections.instructions: Provide a detailed timeline for the proposed research project, including key milestones and timelines for completion of each phase. Include specific timelines for clinical studies, IRB approval, and patient accrual. Detail the expected progress and deliverables for each phase of the project. Use a Gantt chart or similar visual representation if needed.
sections.name: timeline_and_milestones
sections.title: Timeline and Milestones

sections.instructions: Explain how the proposed research project fits within the Melanoma Research Alliance's (MRA) overall research portfolio and strategic priorities. Describe how the project aligns with MRA's goals, especially focusing on advancing prevention, detection, diagnosis, and treatment of melanoma. If applicable, mention relevant MRA programs or initiatives that your project complements or expands upon.
